mapper.select: SELECT t.*, m.category AS category, c.category_name AS category_name, m.model_name AS process_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(m.model_name, ''), t.process_def_key) AS process_definition_name FROM sys_flow_task t LEFT JOIN sys_flow_model m ON t.process_def_key = m.model_key LEFT JOIN sys_flow_category c ON c.id = m.category OR c.category_code = m.category WHERE t.task_id = #{taskId}
SELECT t.* FROM sys_flow_task t WHERE t.task_id = #{taskId} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT t.*, m.category AS category, c.category_name AS category_name, m.model_name AS process_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(m.model_name, ''), t.process_def_key) AS process_definition_name FROM sys_flow_task t LEFT JOIN sys_flow_model m ON t.process_def_key = m.model_key LEFT JOIN sys_flow_category c ON c.id = m.category OR c.category_code = m.category WHERE t.task_id = #{taskId} OR t.id = #{taskId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.task_id = #{taskId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END LIMIT 1

SELECT t.*, m.category AS category, c.category_name AS category_name, m.model_name AS process_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(m.model_name, ''), t.process_def_key) AS process_definition_name FROM sys_flow_task t LEFT JOIN sys_flow_model m ON t.process_def_key = m.model_key LEFT JOIN sys_flow_category c ON c.id = m.category OR c.category_code = m.category
AND (t.assignee = #{userId} OR (t.candidate_users IS NOT NULL AND t.candidate_users != '' AND (t.candidate_users = #{userId} OR t.candidate_users LIKE CONCAT(#{userId}, ',%') OR t.candidate_users LIKE CONCAT('%,', #{userId}) OR t.candidate_users LIKE CONCAT('%,', #{userId}, ',%'))) OR (t.candidate_groups IS NOT NULL AND t.candidate_groups != '')) AND (t.status = 0 OR (t.assignee = #{userId} AND t.status = 1))
AND t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND ( m.category = #{category} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_flow_category fc JOIN sys_flow_category selected ON selected.id = #{category} OR selected.category_code = #{category} WHERE (fc.id = m.category OR fc.category_code = m.category) AND (fc.id = selected.id OR fc.ancestors LIKE CONCAT('%', selected.id, '/%')) ) )
AND t.status = #{status}
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT t.*, m.category AS category, c.category_name AS category_name, m.model_name AS process_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(m.model_name, ''), t.process_def_key) AS process_definition_name FROM sys_flow_task t LEFT JOIN sys_flow_model m ON t.process_def_key = m.model_key LEFT JOIN sys_flow_category c ON c.id = m.category OR c.category_code = m.category WHERE t.due_date IS NOT NULL AND t.due_date <= #{now} AND t.status IN (0, 1) ORDER BY t.due_date ASC, t.create_time ASC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_flow_task t WHERE (t.assignee = #{userId} OR (t.candidate_users IS NOT NULL AND t.candidate_users != '' AND (t.candidate_users = #{userId} OR t.candidate_users LIKE CONCAT(#{userId}, ',%') OR t.candidate_users LIKE CONCAT('%,', #{userId}) OR t.candidate_users LIKE CONCAT('%,', #{userId}, ',%'))) OR (t.candidate_groups IS NOT NULL AND t.candidate_groups != '')) AND (t.status = 0 OR (t.assignee = #{userId} AND t.status = 1))
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_flow_task t WHERE t.start_user_id = #{userId} AND t.status IN (0, 1)
